note: Pure Cinematic 전용 호러 내레이션. 영화 자막체 톤.

ko: [dramatic pause] 컷 원. 추격은 멈추지 않는다.
[dramatic pause] 밤이 내려앉는다. 그리고 다시 시작.
[matter-of-fact] 다음 컷. 같은 길, 다른 시간.
[whispers] 와이드 샷. 쫓기는 자와 쫓는 자.
[dramatic pause] 한 호흡. 한 장면. 모든 것이 바뀐다.
en: [dramatic pause] Cut one. The chase never stops.
[whispers] Scene change. The shadow moved first.
[dramatic pause] Night descends. And it begins again.
[matter-of-fact] New scene. Two hundred meters.
[whispers] Camera rolls. He keeps his eyes forward.
[dramatic pause] Close-up. His breath.
[matter-of-fact] Next cut. Same street, different hour.
[whispers] Wide shot. Hunter and hunted.
[dramatic pause] One breath. One frame. Everything shifts.

ko: [dramatic pause] 한 밤. 한 추격. 한 생존자.
[whispers] 이 타이틀은 네 거야. 벌어서 가져.
en: [dramatic pause] Shadow Runner. Tonight's legend.
[whispers] Star of this night. You.
[dramatic pause] One night. One chase. One survivor.
[matter-of-fact] The title is simple. Run.
[whispers] Shadow Run. He does not stop.
[dramatic pause] A legend begins. Now, here.
[matter-of-fact] Tonight. His story.
[whispers] This title is yours. Earn it.

ko: [matter-of-fact] 그의 뒤, 이백 미터. 혹은 어쩌면 더 가까이.
[matter-of-fact] 수치는 거짓말을 안 한다. 삼십 미터.
[whispers] 가까워짐을 피할 수 없다. 속도로 맞서라.
[dramatic pause] 모든 미터는 선택이다. 이 미터도.
en: [matter-of-fact] Behind him, two hundred meters. Or perhaps less.
[whispers] Distance narrows. So does time.
[matter-of-fact] Numbers don't lie. Thirty meters.
[dramatic pause] Space shrinks. Will grows.
[matter-of-fact] He's hunted by numbers. Meter by meter.
[whispers] Proximity is inevitable. Meet it with speed.
[matter-of-fact] The moment you forget distance is the deadliest.
[dramatic pause] Every meter is a choice. Even this one.
[whispers] Each step rewrites the distance.

ko: [matter-of-fact] 완벽한 속도는 없다. 지금의 속도가 있을 뿐.
en: [matter-of-fact] His pace is his heart.
[whispers] Too slow he fades. Too fast he breaks.
[matter-of-fact] No perfect speed. Only the speed of now.
[dramatic pause] Pace. It keeps him alive.
[whispers] The heart is the clock. Rhythm is time.
[matter-of-fact] Consistency outlives speed.
[dramatic pause] Speed is courage. Holding it is wisdom.
[whispers] He is recorded in pace.

ko: [whispers] 마지막 프레임. 결정은 한 호흡 안에.
[dramatic pause] 모든 장면이 이 장면을 위해 있었다.
[dramatic pause] 더 이상 뒤는 없다. 앞만 있다.
[dramatic pause] 영화의 진실은 이 한 순간에 있다.
en: [dramatic pause] This moment. The film freezes.
[whispers] Final frame. Decision in one breath.
[dramatic pause] Every scene led to this one.
[rushed] Climax. He runs. So does the shadow.
[whispers] His eyes met the dark.
[dramatic pause] No behind. Only ahead.
[rushed] The clock stopped. Only the legs move.
[whispers] This is the scene.
[dramatic pause] The truth of the film lives in this one beat.
[matter-of-fact] Chapter one. Night begins.
[dramatic pause] Chapter two. The chase.
[matter-of-fact] Chapter three. What distance means.
[whispers] Chapter four. Steps in the dark.
[dramatic pause] Chapter five. The edge.
[matter-of-fact] Chapter six. The decision.
[whispers] Chapter seven. Before dawn.
[dramatic pause] Final chapter. Survival.

ko: [matter-of-fact] 그는 스스로에게 속삭였다. 한 걸음만 더.
[whispers] 멈추지 않는 이유를 그는 잊지 않았다.
[whispers] 그는 오늘 자기 이름을 지운다. 내일 다시 쓰기 위해.
[matter-of-fact] 생각하지 않는 것. 그게 그의 전략이었다.
[dramatic pause] 살고 싶다. 단순한 문장이 그를 밀었다.
en: [whispers] Look back, and it's over. He knew.
[matter-of-fact] He whispered to himself. One more step.
[whispers] He hadn't forgotten why he kept going.
[dramatic pause] Fear is fuel. Tonight only.
[whispers] Tonight he erases his name. To write it again tomorrow.
[matter-of-fact] Not thinking. That was his tactic.
[whispers] The dark asks. He does not answer.
[dramatic pause] I want to live. A simple sentence pushed him.
[whispers] While running, he was himself.

ko: [sighs] 화면이 어두워지기 전에, 한 번 숨 쉰다.
en: [calm] Credits roll. The music is quiet.
[matter-of-fact] The end. Tonight's protagonist, you.
[sighs] Before the screen fades, one breath.
[calm] The film is over. The feeling stays.
[dramatic pause] Final cut. The shadow is gone.
[calm] Fade out. Slowly.
[matter-of-fact] Screening ends. Next episode tomorrow.
[sighs] The protagonist made it back.

ko: [dramatic pause] 어둠은 그를 안다. 그도 어둠을 안다.
[dramatic pause] 멈추면 끝이다. 이미 알고 있는 말.
en: [dramatic pause] The shadow never rests.
[whispers] Tonight's survivor.
[dramatic pause] The dark knows him. He knows the dark.
[matter-of-fact] One step. One scene.
[whispers] Speed becomes memory.
[dramatic pause] Stop and it ends. You already know.
[matter-of-fact] He ran today too.
[whispers] This is his night.
[dramatic pause] The scene is short. The result is long.

ko: [whispers] 시작은 결심이었고, 끝은 기록이 될 거다.
[whispers] 한 번의 발걸음이 수 킬로를 만든다.
en: [whispers] Remember this moment.
[whispers] Heroes run quietly.
[whispers] It started as a choice. It ends as a record.
[whispers] His name stays on this road.
[whispers] Silence is the loudest applause.
[whispers] One step makes kilometers.
[whispers] Night is the runner's secret.
[whispers] Your pace is your story.
